name: devtrace
description: Track AI collaboration progress as TraceUnit records, maintain current/index state, and generate periodic reviews.

interface.shortDescription: 沉淀 TraceUnit、维护 current/index，并支持跨会话续写与周期回顾。
interface.longDescription: Use DevTrace to structure AI collaboration progress into TraceUnit records, recover project context from current/index, continue long-running events across sessions, and generate session, daily, weekly, or monthly reviews.
defaultPrompt: Use DevTrace to reconnect me to this project
Use DevTrace to record the current session
Use DevTrace to generate a review from current and index
